description: FocusFine is a digital discipline app that helps you reclaim control of your time. Set daily limits on distracting apps, and if you exceed them, you'll need to pay $1 to unlock access.
longDescription:
FocusFine - Digital Discipline Made Simple

Let's be honest: social media apps are engineered to be addictive. FocusFine makes excessive usage costly—literally.

✨ How it works:
• Set daily time limits on the apps that distract you most (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Twitter, WhatsApp)
• When you hit your limit, FocusFine locks the app with an unbypassable overlay
• Pay $1 for 15 minutes, $5 for 1 hour, or $20 for 24 hours of unlimited access
• Track your spending, see your improvement, and build a streak of discipline

📊 Real-Time Analytics:
• Focus Score: Track your discipline on a 0-100 scale
• Hourly Heatmap: See exactly when you're most vulnerable
• Weekly Trends: Watch your improvements over time
• Money Saved: Visualize the cash you're keeping by saying no

🎯 Advanced Features:
• Strict Mode: Lock yourself out until 5 PM to enforce real discipline
• Perfect Day Streaks: Build momentum with consecutive limit-free days
• Weekly Insights: Discover your peak distraction times and top distracting apps
• Dark Mode: Eye-friendly late-night monitoring

⚡ Why FocusFine Works:
Most apps try to use willpower. FocusFine uses your wallet. When money is on the line, discipline feels different. No tricks, no complexity—just financial friction against your worst impulses.

Ideal for:
• Students preparing for exams
• Professionals fighting productivity loss
• Parents worried about screen time
• Anyone ready to reclaim their attention

FocusFine is completely transparent about permissions:
• Usage Access: To monitor app usage time
• Overlay Permission: To show the unbypassable lock screen
• Background Monitoring: To detect limit violations even when you're away

Start your discipline journey today. Your focus is worth it.
shortDescription: Control your app usage with financial penalties. Set limits, pay to unlock, and reclaim your focus.
adsPolicy: This app does not contain ads

phone.description: Dashboard showing Focus Score and Active Limits
Weekly analytics with hourly heatmap and trends
Unbypassable lock screen when limit is reached
Quick unlock options with flexible payment plans

changelog.notes: Initial release with core features: app limiting, enforcement, analytics, and payment integration
